# VS13 sample fixture

`CitroenC4Picasso_80.mp4` is a public sample clip from the VS13 vehicle-speed dataset.

- Source: https://slobodan.ucg.ac.me/science/vs13/
- Confirmed speed: 80 km/h
- Used by: `tests/browser/real-known-speed.mjs`

The other sample clips from the dataset were downloaded for evaluation and are not part of the committed fixture set.
